issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Add automatic LLM tracing to a TypeScript app that uses OpenAI and Pinecone
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls Langtrace.init from @langtrase/typescript-sdk with batch:true and per-provider instrumentations (openai, pinecone) before SDK imports as the skill documents; baseline writes manual OpenTelemetry spans or generic logging and misses the auto-instrumentation pattern.

scenarios.name: Trace a Python RAG pipeline as a single grouped trace with custom user-tier attributes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @with_langtrace_root_span for the RAG function and @with_additional_attributes for user.tier/feature tagging from langtrace_python_sdk; baseline writes its own span context manager and lacks the documented root-span + additional-attributes decorators.
